asset.title: L6 Long Horizon
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: An excellent, highly detailed step-by-step visualization of multi-cell updates with human-in-the-loop concurrency conflicts, CAS rejection, and context compaction.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates Compare-And-Swap (CAS) conflict resolution and context compaction during multi-cell updates.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete lifecycle: read, human commit, CAS rejection, re-read, compaction, and final write.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear color-coded states (blue for human, red for conflict, green for success).

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the multi-cell spreadsheet and versioned agent execution model.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity trace replay that feels authentic and technically detailed.

legibility.evidence: Excellent contrast and text size; easily readable at standard browser resolutions.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly valuable for technical audiences evaluating LLM transaction safety and concurrency.

productionHonesty.evidence: Transparently displays write failures, stale states, and the recovery/retry loop.

observedEvidence: Color-coded state transitions for human commits and CAS rejections
Compaction events clearly marked in the progress bar
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent handle concurrent human edits using Compare-And-Swap (CAS) and context compaction to prevent data overwrites across a long-horizon multi-cell workflow.
